title: astragalus obtusifolius
intro: Astragalus obtusifolius, also known as the lesser milkvetch, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus obtusifolius include reducing fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Astragalus obtusifolius can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
